
# 8. Plastic-degrading enzyme heatmap

```{r plastic_heatmap_curated_section, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(knitr)

find_existing_file <- function(candidates) {
  candidates <- unique(candidates)
  found <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(found) > 0) {
    return(found[1])
  }
  return(NA_character_)
}

if (!exists("res_dir")) {
  res_dir <- "Results"
}

plots_dir <- file.path(res_dir, "Plots")
hmmer_dir <- file.path(res_dir, "HMMER")

heatmap_file <- find_existing_file(c(
  file.path(plots_dir, "plastic_degrading_heatmap.png"),
  file.path("Results", "Plots", "plastic_degrading_heatmap.png"),
  file.path("Results_short", "Plots", "plastic_degrading_heatmap.png")
))

curated_file <- find_existing_file(c(
  file.path(hmmer_dir, "plastic_heatmap_summary_curated.csv"),
  file.path(hmmer_dir, "plastic_heatmap_summary.csv"),
  file.path("Results", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary_curated.csv"),
  file.path("Results", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary.csv"),
  file.path("Results_short", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary_curated.csv"),
  file.path("Results_short", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary.csv")
))

excluded_file <- find_existing_file(c(
  file.path(hmmer_dir, "plastic_heatmap_summary_excluded.csv"),
  file.path("Results", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary_excluded.csv"),
  file.path("Results_short", "HMMER", "plastic_heatmap_summary_excluded.csv")
))

cat("The main table and heatmap show curated candidates only. Broad PFAM domains and non-specific annotations were excluded from the main report and retained in supplementary files. ")

if (!is.na(heatmap_file)) {
  cat(sprintf(
    '<div style="text-align:center;"><img src="%s" style="max-width:100%%; height:auto;"></div>',
    heatmap_file
  ))
} else {
  cat('<div class="no-hits">Heatmap not found. Run: python3 scripts/plastic_heatmap_curated.py --results Results --output Results/Plots</div>')
}

if (!is.na(curated_file)) {

  curated_tbl <- read.csv(curated_file, check.names = FALSE)

  cat("\n\n## Confidence classification\n\n")

  if ("Confidence" %in% colnames(curated_tbl)) {
    conf_counts <- as.data.frame(table(curated_tbl$Confidence))
    colnames(conf_counts) <- c("Confidence level", "Number of hits")
    print(kable(conf_counts, caption = "Number of curated HMMER hits by confidence level."))
  }

  cat("\n\n## Curated candidate table\n\n")

  preferred_cols <- c(
    "Protein ID", "Plastic type", "HMM profile", "PFAM",
    "E-value", "Score", "Annotation", "Phylum",
    "Confidence", "Classification reason"
  )
  available_cols <- preferred_cols[preferred_cols %in% colnames(curated_tbl)]

  print(kable(
    curated_tbl[, available_cols, drop = FALSE],
    caption = "Curated plastic-associated candidates classified by confidence level."
  ))

} else {
  cat('<div class="no-hits">Curated summary table not found. Run plastic_heatmap_curated.py first.</div>')
}

if (!is.na(excluded_file)) {
  excluded_tbl <- read.csv(excluded_file, check.names = FALSE)

  cat("\n\n## Excluded low-specificity hits\n\n")
  cat("The following hits were removed from the main table because they matched promiscuous PFAMs or non-specific annotations such as penicillin-binding proteins, beta-lactamases, amidotransferases, aminopeptidases, D-alanyl-D-alanine-related proteins, housekeeping/ribosomal/tRNA terms or hypothetical proteins.\n\n")

  if (nrow(excluded_tbl) > 0) {
    excluded_counts <- as.data.frame(table(excluded_tbl$`Plastic type`))
    colnames(excluded_counts) <- c("Plastic type", "Excluded hits")
    print(kable(excluded_counts, caption = "Excluded low-specificity hits by plastic type."))
  }
}
```
